description_long: This modern sofa features a minimalist L-shaped design with a combination of light wood and smooth gray upholstery. The seating area and backrest are both rectangular and uniform, with the backrest running the full length of the seat. The left side of the sofa incorporates an integrated wooden platform that serves as a side table or extension, seamlessly connected to the main frame. The right side has a single, solid armrest that matches the height of the backrest, providing a clean, geometric profile. The sofa sits low to the ground, with no visible legs, and the upholstery appears to be tightly fitted and unadorned, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with foam cushioning for comfort.
description: A modern L-shaped sofa with smooth gray upholstery, a solid right armrest, and an integrated light wood platform on the left. The design is minimalist, with a continuous backrest and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, gray seat and backrest, right armrest, and the integrated wooden platform on the left.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the solid armrest and the thickness of the backrest, with the wooden platform barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the wooden platform extending from the left side.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the wooden platform's surface and the backrest's depth, with the armrest not visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions, both attached and uniform in size, forming a clean L-shaped layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Single, solid right armrest at the same height as the backrest, with a straight, blocky profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears to rest directly on the ground, giving a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight, medium-height backrest running the full length of the seat, with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, stitching, or decorative detailing.
